response: During the 2024-25 NBA season, 40-year-old Los Angeles Lakers star LeBron James appeared in 71 total games and earned a selection to that year’s NBA All-Star Game. Over that stretch, the future Hall of Famer posted elite per-game averages of 28.4 points, 7.2 rebounds, and 8.1 assists, turning in a remarkably consistent high-level campaign that defies typical expectations for veteran players of his age.
